title: Validate Python EDHOC method
description: Reject unsupported or malformed METHOD_CORR before mutating responder session state; current implementation supports SIGN_SIGN only.
acceptance_criteria: Initiator creation rejects unsupported methods; responder rejects malformed or unsupported METHOD_CORR before state mutation; focused EDHOC tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Unsupported and malformed EDHOC methods now fail before session mutation.
